parsed_review.summary: CP00-316 (risk A, 10 units, RP09.P07.M06.S15-RP09.P07.M07.S04) is a descriptor-only CRM-core failure-fixture slice pack and passes independent read-only review. The plan, next-pack-queue (live_latest CP00-315, live_next RP09.P07.M06.S15), manifest, baseline, registry binding (CRM_CORE_CP316_PACK_BINDING), contract current_pack/failure_fixture_slice_descriptor projections, and historical bindings (tail=CP00-316) are mutually consistent, with the deliverable {hermes_evidence:2,fixture:1,test:2,security_audit:1,failure_recovery:4} and micro-title {Synthetic Fixture Set:6,Test And Golden Case Set:4} distributions matching exactly. The implementation is pure frozen-object construction: the CRM src modules import no fs/network/child_process/env, and row-level failure guards (blocked_claim_detail_included:false, real_client_data_loaded:false, executes_unit_test_runtime_paths:false, dispatches_integration_smoke_runtime:false, audit_hint_detail_included:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false) are present and enforced by validateCrmCoreCp316FailureFixtureSliceDescriptor. Authority boundaries hold: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, Claude review packet read_only with Read/Grep/Glob; Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic descriptor/evidence packets (no product runtime receipts). The pack does not overclaim production readiness (manifest production_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review), and the post-review adjudication/inspection/result artifacts are correctly absent at this stage. Auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1444-byte valid JSON), prompt 2196B is within limit, forbidden tools absent, and source was inspected via read tools as required for the security/audit deliverable. Tests (model.test.js) and the rp09 validator script provide comprehensive coverage/boundary assertions. No findings; final enterprise-trust approval remains a human responsibility outside this receipt.
